3131410.name: Fantasy Grounds - FG Modern Military Map Pack
3131410.description:
FG Modern Military Map Pack

The Modern Military Map Pack features images and art produced by our in-house artist, Joshua Watmough. They have been organized and optimized for use with Fantasy Grounds Unity and the image tools.
This map pack consists of nearly 100 images that can be used to create or enhance existing maps. This pack includes the following items:
  • Brushes of barbed wire barriers and metal roofed hangers
  • Decorations include tanks, mortars, military equipment, trailers, and more
  • Fills include dirt ground texture and metal roof
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Joshua Watmough
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and any ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
